capabilities.name: Lead Management
capabilities.purpose: Acquire and qualify potential customers for solar projects.

capabilities.name: Site Assessment
capabilities.purpose: Survey customer roofs to determine suitability for solar installation.

capabilities.name: Solution Design
capabilities.purpose: Create technical designs tailored to customer sites.

capabilities.name: Sales and Quoting
capabilities.purpose: Create commercial offers to convert qualified leads into sold projects.

capabilities.name: Procurement
capabilities.purpose: Purchase equipment needed to fulfill installation projects.

capabilities.name: Installation Management
capabilities.purpose: Schedule and execute installation and commissioning of solar systems.

capabilities.name: Billing
capabilities.purpose: Invoice customers for delivered projects and services.

capabilities.name: System Maintenance
capabilities.purpose: Monitor and maintain installed systems to ensure ongoing performance.

contexts.name: Customer Acquisition
contexts.intent: Identify and convert prospective customers into sold solar projects.

contexts.name: Engineering
contexts.intent: Assess sites and design technical solutions tailored to customer needs.

contexts.name: Project Delivery
contexts.intent: Procure equipment and execute installation of solar systems.

derivedFrom.anchor: Project fulfillment workflow from purchasing to on-site execution

contexts.name: Finance
contexts.intent: Manage billing and revenue collection for delivered projects.

derivedFrom.anchor: Financial transactions tied to completed projects

contexts.name: Customer Support & Operations
contexts.intent: Ensure ongoing performance of installed systems for customer satisfaction.

policies.name: Sync lead capture to customer
policies.condition: when a new lead is captured, mirror it as a customer lead

policies.name: Sync lead qualification to customer
policies.condition: when a lead is qualified, qualify the corresponding customer lead

policies.name: Start design after site survey completed
policies.condition: if the site survey confirms suitability for a system design

policies.name: Draft offer after design finalized
policies.condition: once the system design is finalized

policies.name: Create purchase order after offer accepted
policies.condition: to procure equipment needed for the accepted offer

policies.name: Schedule installation after offer accepted
policies.condition: if the offer includes installation services

policies.name: Create work order after purchase order received
Open maintenance ticket on underperformance
policies.condition: when monitoring detects underperformance requiring service

agents.name: Sales Agent
agents.goal: Acquire and convert qualified leads into sold solar projects

agents.name: Design & Assessment Agent
agents.goal: Survey sites and produce tailored technical solar designs

agents.name: Operations Agent
agents.goal: Procure equipment and manage installation and commissioning of solar systems

agents.name: Finance Agent
agents.goal: Invoice customers accurately and ensure timely payment for delivered projects

agents.name: Maintenance Agent
agents.goal: Monitor and maintain installed solar systems to ensure ongoing performance
